summary: Complete frontend testing of light/dark mode and presentation page features. All 15 features tested successfully. Sidebar theme toggle (data-testid='sidebar-theme-toggle') works correctly, switching between light (#F5F5F0 background) and dark (#030303 background) modes. Presentation page has its own independent theme toggle (data-testid='pres-theme-toggle'). All 7 sidebar navigation links work correctly.

design_issues.issue: Some slides (like OBJECTIVES) appear to have delayed content rendering - content visible but takes moment to animate in
design_issues.note: Content uses motion animations with delays, working as intended

passed_tests: Sidebar contains 'PRÉSENTATION' link that navigates to /presentation
Theme toggle switches app between light and dark modes
In dark mode: sidebar has dark background, main content has dark background (#030303), Matrix Rain visible
In light mode: sidebar has white background, main content has light background (#F5F5F0), Matrix Rain hidden
CyberBorder cards have white background in light mode
Homepage hero text 'CYBER SENTINELLE' is readable in both modes
Stats section shows properly styled cards with white background in light mode
Feature cards on homepage are white with borders in light mode
Dashboard EDA page renders correctly with light background in light mode
Model ML page renders correctly in light mode with visible metrics and 3D visualization
Prediction page renders correctly in light mode with form and radar scanner
Clustering page renders correctly in light mode with scatter plot and metrics
Live Monitor page renders in light mode
Presentation page (/presentation) has its own theme toggle (data-testid='pres-theme-toggle')
Presentation page navigation (prev/next) works correctly - 14 slides total
Presentation page Home, Download, Fullscreen buttons work
All sidebar nav links work: ACCUEIL (7/7 passed)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Light/dark mode toggle working correctly. Main app uses ThemeContext shared via useTheme() hook. Sidebar toggle (data-testid='sidebar-theme-toggle') controls main app theme. Presentation page (/presentation) is standalone with its own toggle (data-testid='pres-theme-toggle'). Dark mode: bg #030303, Matrix Rain visible, dark sidebar. Light mode: bg #F5F5F0, white sidebar, Matrix Rain hidden, white CyberBorder cards. All 7 nav links verified: ACCUEIL, LIVE MONITOR, DASHBOARD EDA, MODÈLE ML, PRÉDICTION, CLUSTERING, PRÉSENTATION.
